# zohomail_domain_dkim (Resource)

Manage a Zoho Mail DKIM selector for a domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zohomail_domain" "example" {
  domain_name = "example.com"
}

resource "zohomail_domain_dkim" "example" {
  domain_name       = zohomail_domain.example.domain_name
  selector          = "terraform"
  hash_type         = "sha256"
  make_default      = true
  verify_public_key = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain_name` (String) Zoho Mail domain name.
- `hash_type` (String) Hash type requested from Zoho Mail for the DKIM selector.
- `selector` (String) DKIM selector name.

### Optional

- `make_default` (Boolean) Whether to set the DKIM selector as the domain default after creation.
- `verify_public_key` (Boolean) Whether to trigger DKIM verification after DNS is ready.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier `<domain_name>:<dkim_id>`.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether the selector is the default DKIM key.
- `is_verified` (Boolean) Whether Zoho Mail reports the selector as verified.
- `public_key` (String) Generated DKIM public key to publish in DNS.
